use_cases: Trigger form submissions with styled primary and secondary action buttons
Navigate users through multi-step flows using ghost or outline variants
Indicate destructive actions with red destructive variant buttons
Create icon-only buttons for compact UI areas using the icon size variant
Build accessible interfaces with Radix Slot composition and focus-visible states
ai_summary: A reusable button component built on Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, offering 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 size options. Includes shadow styling, hover states, focus-visible outlines, and disabled state handling for production-ready interactive UI elements.
